title: The Legends of Rocks, Roger, and Oden Surface
description: On pages 15–18, this part focuses on Big Mom, Unknown person #13, Kaido, Luffy, Unknown person #14, Whitebeard as The story turns to Oden’s past, showing how his life, Whitebeard, Roger, and Orochi shaped Wano’s tragedy.
scene: The story turns to Oden’s past, showing how his life, Whitebeard, Roger, and Orochi shaped Wano’s tragedy.

dialogue.text: Whether drawing out the poison from within our ranks in this way was the correct move or not

dialogue.text: will be decided in the future by the special science group, SSG.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Finally, allow me to remind you of the Bounties of two legendary men!

dialogue.text: However, if Kaido and big mom truly do ally,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Of course, I have no intention of getting involved.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I was just imparting the wisdom of an aged fogy like myself to the young future of the marines.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: pirates have interpersonal relationships too! Reasons for their next move!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator

summary: This section advances the Wano - Oden and the Old Era storyline with 35 dialogue beats. The story turns to Oden’s past, showing how his life, Whitebeard, Roger, and Orochi shaped Wano’s tragedy.
